entries.line_text: pragma Assume (" & Channel_Length_Image (Unit, Document, State, Channel_Item, Value_Name) & " = " & Length_Name & ");
entries.rationale: Generated channel-length reconciliation assumption ties the compiler-generated scalar channel length model to the emitted length formal under the non-sequential scalar ghost-model path. Accepted as an internal proof bridge, not a user-authored proof bypass.

entries.line_text: pragma Annotate (GNATprove, Intentional, "float overflow check might fail", "A-05: The compiler ensures the result is finite at " & "narrowing points via range analysis. See " & "companion/assumptions.yaml A-05.");
entries.rationale: Companion SPARK floating-division annotation is tied to assumption A-05 and documents a low-level runtime floating-point assumption outside emitted Safe source. It is not a compiler-generated proof exemption.

entries.line_text: pragma Warnings (GNATprove, Off, """ & Pattern & """, Reason => """ & Reason & """);
entries.rationale: Centralized emitter helper for scoped GNATprove warning suppressions. Accepted because call sites supply explicit pattern and reason text and pair suppressions with matching restores; the baseline keeps this helper as the trust-boundary generator.

entries.first_line_text: pragma Warnings (GNATprove, Off, ""is set by"", Reason => ""generated timer cancel result is intentionally ignored"");
entries.line_text: pragma Warnings (GNATprove, Off, ""is set by"", Reason => ""generated timer cancel result is intentionally ignored"");
entries.rationale: Generated timer-cancel cleanup intentionally ignores an out/result object that is not used on this cleanup path. The suppression is tightly scoped around the generated call and immediately restored with Warnings On.

entries.first_line_text: pragma Warnings (GNATprove, Off, ""is set by"", Reason => ""generated dispatcher wake result is intentionally ignored on no-delay select paths"");
entries.line_text: pragma Warnings (GNATprove, Off, ""is set by"", Reason => ""generated dispatcher wake result is intentionally ignored on no-delay select paths"");
entries.rationale: Generated dispatcher wake on the no-delay select path intentionally ignores an out/result object. The suppression is tightly scoped around the await call and immediately restored with Warnings On.
